Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Gilberte Martine-Edith. Author, contributor, maintainer.

  • Jonah Thomas. Contributor.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Martine-Edith G (2026). hypometrics: Methods To Analyse Continuous Glucose Monitoring, Activity, Sleep and Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia Data. R package version 0.1.0, https://leicester-cdag.github.io/hypometrics/, https://github.com/Leicester-CDAG/hypometrics. 

@Manual{,
  title = {hypometrics: Methods To Analyse Continuous Glucose Monitoring, Activity, Sleep and Person-Reported Hypoglycaemia Data},

  year = {2026},
